item.title: PGATOURComms: PGA TOUR Communications @PGATOURComms · 2min With 11 birdies in the second round, Akshay Bhatia ties the tournament reco
item.description:
PGA TOUR Communications @PGATOURComms · 2min With 11 birdies in the second round, Akshay Bhatia ties the tournament record for the most birdies in a single round at Harbour Town Golf Links.
RBC Heritage - 11 birdies in one round: Akshay Bhatia (2026 R2, 63) Justin Thomas (2025 R1, 61 – Won) Peter Lonard (2005 R1, 62 – Won) Cita PGA TOUR @PGATOUR · 24min Psycho scorecard
11 birdies for @AkshayBhatia_1 on his way to an 8-under second round @RBC_Heritage. 1 2 1 mil

item.title:
jamierkennedy: Jamie Kennedy @jamierkennedy · 3min Think about this....
We might be just 65 days away from Scottie Scheffler completin
item.description:
Jamie Kennedy @jamierkennedy · 3min Think about this....
We might be just 65 days away from Scottie Scheffler completing the career grand slam.
(Or 32 days from Jordan Spieth doing it first!) 1 2 201

item.title: AlanShipnuck: Alan Shipnuck @AlanShipnuck · 6min Southern California folks: I’m part of a killer panel tomorrow at the @latimesfob w
